# Schema Documentation

This documentation describes a [ZModel](https://zenstack.dev/docs/reference/zmodel/overview) schema — the data modeling language used by [ZenStack](https://zenstack.dev/).

> 11 models · 2 views · 3 types · 6 enums · 6 procedures

[Models](#models) · [Views](#views) · [Types](#types) · [Enums](#enums) · [Procedures](#procedures) · [Relationships](./relationships.md) · [ERD](#erd)

<a id="models"></a>

## 🗃️ Models

- [Article](./models/Article.md) — A long-form content article published within a workspace.
- [AuditLog](./models/AuditLog.md) — A record in the append-only audit log for compliance and debugging.
- [Category](./models/Category.md) — A content category for organizing articles within a workspace.
- [Comment](./models/Comment.md) — A threaded comment on an article.
- [Invoice](./models/Invoice.md) — An invoice generated for a subscription billing cycle.
- [Notification](./models/Notification.md) — A notification delivered to a user.
- [NotificationPreference](./models/NotificationPreference.md) — Per-user notification delivery preferences.
- [Subscription](./models/Subscription.md) — A subscription linking a workspace to a billing plan.
- [User](./models/User.md) — A registered user account in the platform.
- [Workspace](./models/Workspace.md) — A collaborative workspace that groups users, content, and billing.
- [WorkspaceMember](./models/WorkspaceMember.md) — Represents a user's membership in a workspace with an assigned role.

<a id="views"></a>

## 👁️ Views

- [ArticleAnalytics](./views/ArticleAnalytics.md) — Aggregated article metrics for the workspace analytics dashboard.
- [MemberActivity](./views/MemberActivity.md) — Per-member activity summary for workspace admin dashboards.

<a id="types"></a>

## 🧩 Types

- [SoftDeletable](./types/SoftDeletable.md) — Adds soft-delete capability to a model.
- [Timestamps](./types/Timestamps.md) — Standard timestamp fields applied to all persistent entities.
- [WorkspaceAnalytics](./types/WorkspaceAnalytics.md) — Aggregated workspace-level analytics returned by `getWorkspaceAnalytics`.

<a id="enums"></a>

## 🏷️ Enums

- [ArticleStatus](./enums/ArticleStatus.md) — Lifecycle status of a published article.
- [BillingInterval](./enums/BillingInterval.md) — Billing interval for subscription plans.
- [NotificationChannel](./enums/NotificationChannel.md) — Delivery channel for user notifications.
- [NotificationSeverity](./enums/NotificationSeverity.md) — Severity level of a notification.
- [SubscriptionStatus](./enums/SubscriptionStatus.md) — Current status of a subscription lifecycle.
- [WorkspaceRole](./enums/WorkspaceRole.md) — Defines the access level of a user within a workspace.

<a id="procedures"></a>

## ⚡ Procedures

- [cancelSubscription](./procedures/cancelSubscription.md) · *mutation* — Cancel a workspace subscription.
- [getWorkspaceAnalytics](./procedures/getWorkspaceAnalytics.md) · *query* — Retrieve workspace analytics including article counts, total views, and member activity metrics.
- [inviteMember](./procedures/inviteMember.md) · *mutation* — Invite a new member to a workspace.
- [publishArticle](./procedures/publishArticle.md) · *mutation* — Publish an article, transitioning it from DRAFT to PUBLISHED.
- [searchArticles](./procedures/searchArticles.md) · *query* — Search articles within a workspace by title and body content.
- [unpublishArticle](./procedures/unpublishArticle.md) · *mutation* — Unpublish a live article, moving it back to DRAFT status.
